launch.note: Your intro post. Post this first, then pin it to the top of your profile.
launch.caption:
Free Singapore property intelligence is now live at propsight.sg.

PropSight shows you what any HDB or condo is really worth, worked out from real recent sales nearby. Plus what you can truly afford, the stamp duty and hidden costs, and the schools within 1km. All in plain English, with no agent and no signup.

This is the account for straight Singapore property numbers, no spin. Every week: real home values, the market shifts that matter, and the buying myths people still believe.

Follow along, and check any home free at propsight.sg (link in bio)

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdb #hdbresale #condosingapore #sgproperty #propertyinvestment #sghomeowners #bto
launch.alt: PropSight on a laptop and a phone, free Singapore property intelligence at propsight.sg

posts.note: Start of the week, strongest reach. A hook or myth to stop the scroll.
posts.caption:
Property myth busted: stamp duty on your first home
Everyone says you pay extra stamp duty buying property. Not true.
A Singapore citizen pays 0% ABSD on their first home. ABSD only kicks in from your second property.
So your first place? No extra stamp duty to worry about.
Check yours free at propsight.sg (link in bio)

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #sgproperty #absd #stampduty #hdbresale #firsthome #condosingapore

Tampines 4-room HDB resale is sitting around $710k right now

That number is not a guess. It comes from 2526 real Tampines sales this year, not one neighbour's gossip.

Before you list or lowball, check what your exact block and floor are really worth.

posts.note: Friday feed. A striking photo post pulls in reach.
posts.caption:
Thinking of selling your HDB flat but have no idea what it's worth?

PropSight values any HDB flat for free using real recent sales right in your estate, not some guess off a portal average. Same block, same flat type, what people actually paid. Check before you list or before you make an offer, so you walk in knowing your number.

Check yours free at propsight.sg (link in bio)

posts.note: Weekend scroll. A quick tool or tip people act on.
posts.caption:
The price is never the price.

On a $1.65M home you're really looking at about $117k more, stamp duty, legal fees and renovation, before you get the keys.

Work out your real total free at propsight.sg (link in bio).

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #sgproperty #stampduty #homebuying
posts.alt: The real cost of a home
